title: Three Stripes in the Sun
writer: Albert Duffy, E.J. Kahn Jr., Richard Murphy
actors: Aldo Ray, Philip Carey, Dick York
plot: Army Master Sergeant Hugh O'Reilly is stationed in Japan after World War II. He hates the Japanese. He meets a pretty young Japanese woman, an interpreter for the Army, and through her learns of an orphanage in need of help. He en...
